name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Mission: Wife | "And she asked how many kids I want. KIDS, Ijichi!”

Satoru is looking for a wife...on a marriage agency site.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

I tested this bot with Deepseek and chatting works really well there. JLLM causes some problems sometimes, but it works too, even if not as well.

I hope you had a nice weekend, my weekend was quite relaxed, I tried to unwind a little.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
